items.description: Research best practices for documenting findings in the reporting phase.
Identify key elements that should be included in a report during the reporting phase.
Compile recommendations for remediation based on documented findings.
Gather examples of effective reporting templates or formats used in the reporting phase.
Analyze common pitfalls in the reporting phase and how to avoid them.
Summarize findings and prepare a structured report on the reporting phase.
